page_content:
HESP848 Seminar in Audiology (3 Credits)

Research tipics realted to hearing assissment, amplification, and audiologic rehabilitation.

Restriction: Must be in one of the following programs (Hearing and Speech Sciences: Ph.D. (Doctoral); Clinical Audiology: Au.D. or Ph.D. (Doctoral); Hearing and Speech Sciences: M.A. (Master's)) ; and permission of instructor.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
